# nDPI third-party notice

KSword vendors nDPI 5.0 at upstream commit `375f99ef9fb4999d778b57bbeece171b3fa9fba6`.

- Upstream project: https://github.com/ntop/nDPI
- Copyright: 2011-2025 ntop.org and nDPI contributors
- License: GNU Lesser General Public License v3.0 or later (`LICENSE.txt`)

KSword-specific changes are isolated to `ksword_bridge/`, `ksword_windows/`, and the Visual Studio project files. The upstream `src/` directory is unmodified.
